label: Arduino: Auto-Upload
command: if [[ "$ZED_FILE" != *.ino ]]; then echo "Error: Not a .ino file"; exit 1; fi; SKETCH_NAME=$(basename "$ZED_FILE" .ino); TMP_DIR="/tmp/$SKETCH_NAME"; mkdir -p "$TMP_DIR"; cp "$ZED_FILE" "$TMP_DIR/$SKETCH_NAME.ino"; PORT=$(arduino-cli board list | awk 'NR>1 && $1!="Port" {print $1}' | head -n 1); if [ -z "$PORT" ]; then echo 'No Arduino found! Check cable connection.'; exit 1; fi; clear; echo "Flash -> $SKETCH_NAME on $PORT"; arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:uno --upload --port "$PORT" "$TMP_DIR"; rm -rf "$TMP_DIR"
